info.title: Reward Prize Engine API
info.description: Tenant-facing Prize Engine endpoints for catalog reads, fairness verification, reward decisions, observability, and ledger lookups.

bearerAuth.description: Preferred transport for project API keys.

apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyAuth.description: Alternative header-based project API key transport.

get.summary: Fetch the current project catalog and fairness commit.
get.description: Returns the active project, fairness commit, and prize catalog for the requested environment.

X-Prize-Engine-Environment.description: The resolved project environment for the response.

X-Prize-Engine-Sandbox.description: Present when the request was served from the sandbox environment.

schema.example: SANDBOX - non-billable and isolated from live distribution

400.description: The request body or query string failed validation.

401.description: The API key was missing or invalid.

429.description: The API key or project exhausted an auth or rate-limit budget.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds until the caller should retry.

500.description: The backend failed while processing the request.
